steps.title: Use the contrast
steps.content: The parenthetical contrasts the blank with words used mainly in specialized or academic publications, which are poorly represented. The blank must therefore describe ordinary, standard words that a general corpus would represent well.

steps.title: Reject mismatched qualities
steps.content: A describes low importance, C describes depth or seriousness, and D describes randomness; none means ordinary or commonly used. The example of world as a frequent noun points to standard usage. The answer is B.
